leadText: Vinegar (Japanese: ビネガー Vinegar) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A very sour condiment. Vinegars derived from grapes are popular in Paldea. Highly effective when used to add just a light note of flavor.
